title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.1020 - Rent or lease of property, when
text:
141.1020.  Rent or lease of property, when. — Notwithstanding any provision of sections 141.980 to 141.1020 to the contrary, a land bank agency may rent or lease property held by the land bank agency for community, noncommercial agricultural uses.
(L. 2024 H.B. 2062)
